title: The Yuragi Inn's Yuuna
overview: Kogarashi Fuyuzora is a hands-on psychic, who has finally found a decent place to live and work. Being a psychic, he was supposed to easily exorcise whatever ghost was haunting his new home, but he runs into a minor problem...

title: Yuuna and the Hot Spring Ping Pong
overview: In accoradance to the Yuragi Inn boarding house rules, Kogarashi finds himself playing a one-game match of ping pong with a certain team?

title: Yuuna Goes to School
overview: It's Kogarashi's first day of school! Of course, Yuuna decides to tag along, and gets Kogarashi into all sorts of trouble.

title: Watching Youkai! Sagiri and Yaya are Cautious.
overview: Kogarashi learns more about Sagiri, and she evens hires him for a job! Wait, is this a date? Yaya also starts following Kogarashi around for some reason…

title: Yuuna's Body Measurements / Nonko's Crunch Time
overview: Yuuna might have found a new friend! Meanwhile, Nonko-sensei needs a lot of help from Kogarashi.

title: Ms. Nakai's Secret Adventure / A Sweet Day Off with Yuuna
overview: There's a certain secret that Ms. Nakai can't tell the tenants at Yuragi Inn, but she still goes on that adventure. Meanwhile, Kogarashi tries to figure out what Yuuna's lingering regrets can be…

title: Yuuna's Mysterious Disapppearance
overview: Yuuna and Koyuzu are running an errand when a young man they’ve never seen before suddenly calls out. His name is Genshiro Ryuuga, though he’s called the Black Dragon God, and he’s come to Yukemuri Town to find a bride.

title: Oboro Stops at Nothing
overview: Kogarashi, Sagiri, and Koyuzu carry out their mission to try and rescue Yuuna. However, Oboro, the Black Dragon God's attendant is a formidable enemy.

title: Chisaki of the Yuragi Inn
overview: Chisaki comes to visit the Yuragi Inn on the weekend. She decides to spend the night and have a sleepover, much to Yuuna and Chisaki's delight.

title: The Overly Aggressive Sagiri / The Seaside School and Kogarashi
overview: Yuuna tags along to Kogarashi, Sagiri, and Chisaki's seaside school trip. However, through the suggestion of another Chuuma ninja member, Urara, Sagiri needs to buy a new swimsuit.

title: Dancing Cheek to Cheek with Yuuna / Sagiri and the Final Exam
overview: The sea side school trip continues as Kogarashi faces a monster that was accidentally summoned.

title: Yuuna and the Haunted Hot Springs, and…
overview: Everyone is enjoying their last few days of summer vacation. Kogarashi and Yuuna find themselves in Okinawa, and encounter another bound ghost.
